ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location or country involved in the trade */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being traded */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the trade record */,
  "export_value" REAL /* Value of exports for the year */,
  "import_value" REAL /* Value of imports for the year */,
  "hs_eci" REAL /* Economic Complexity Index for the location */,
  "hs_coi" REAL /* Complexity of the HS product */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code (e.g., ISO country code) */,
  "hs_product_code" TEXT /* HS product code (Harmonized System classification) */,
  "trade_flow_type" TEXT /* Type of trade flow (e.g., bilateral, multilateral) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., export, import) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for quantity (e.g., tons, units) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the product traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location or country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the location belongs to */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the location is part of */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System code for classification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, food) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product (for more specific classification) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade record */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location the indicators are associated with */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the indicators are for */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the location */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the location */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the location */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the location */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade statistic record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the statistics apply */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistics */,
  "total_exports" REAL /* Total exports for the year */,
  "total_imports" REAL /* Total imports for the year */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance (exports - imports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the trend */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for the trend */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the trend record */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value representing the trend (could be growth or decline) */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth for the trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data associated with this transaction */,
  "seller_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller location */,
  "buyer_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer location */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Value of the trade transaction */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., air, sea, land) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_trades_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_trades_seller_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_trades_buyer_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the source updates data */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_external_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data the link is associated with */,
  "external_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "external_link" TEXT /* The actual link to the external data */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_external_links_external_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_external_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("data_id")
)
